title: Armor durability (numbers on top half)
description:
list armor durability on a person
but only for the helm and chestplate
body:
**Armor Dura (Numbers on top half)**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- This Pack Illustrates the Durability of Armor after damage to the armor with shades of gray matching the netherite look and Also shows current durability of armor. ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8L474D3d/images/7977f89fc8ad64582013f006a3bada8efc3812a6.png)
--- In more depth and detail This texture pack makes it super easy to see the durability of your top armor pieces, like your helmet and chestplate, by giving them clear visual changes as they take damage. Instead of opening your inventory to check, the armor gradually shifts color so you can instantly tell how much durability is left. It’s really helpful for PvP, survival, or any situation where your gear takes hits. The pack also shows the current durability of each piece, giving you extra clarity so you’re never caught off guard by breaking armor. To use this pack, you’ll need OptiFine or CIT-Resewn for Fabric so the durability-based textures work correctly. With those installed, your helmet and chestplate automatically update in real time as they lose durability. The pack uses shading and brightness changes similar to how netherite items darken when damaged, applied just to the top half of the armor. The different shades of gray make each durability stage easy to see without being distracting or changing the original Minecraft style. Overall, this pack is perfect if you want a simple, visually satisfying way to track the durability of your helmet and chestplate without affecting the rest of your armor. Pack textures by cutebow Idea by Steven (he also tried helping with textures) ------------------- have any questions? need help? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** (it would be appreciated we spent forever working on this pack)
